item.description:
Visual Improvements

  • Better Apple Logo Alignment: The Apple logo now sits perfectly on MacBook Pro and MacBook Air M2+ displays with a notch.
  • Refined Borders & Corners: Menu bar capsules now support fully rounded or sharp corners — choose the look that fits your style.
  • Improved Fullscreen Behavior: The overlay now correctly hides and reappears when you enter or exit fullscreen.

Menu Bar Item Management

  • Smoother Hover Detection: Hovering over the hidden section area now responds more fluidly.
  • More Reliable Clicks: Improved detection to tell apart a click from a drag, so you no longer trigger accidental actions.

Stability & Performance

  • Automatic Recovery After Sleep: Glow now correctly reconfigures itself when your Mac wakes from sleep.
  • Hidden Item Count Badge On by Default: You can always see at a glance how many items are tucked away in your hidden section.
  • General Performance Improvements: Internal optimizations for smoother overall experience and lower resource usage.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed capsule spacing on both notch and non-notch displays.
  • Fixed overlay misalignment that could occur after dragging items.
  • Improved detection of popups and system windows to avoid interference with the menu bar.
